headline: AI Crushed Software Stocks. IGV Is Betting the ‘SaaSpocalypse’ Is Overblown
summary: The iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF (BATS:IGV) is down 10.5% year to date while the S&P 500 is up 10.8% and the Technology Select Sector SPDR is up 26%. That gap reflects the market pricing software as if the AI thesis has turned against it. Own IGV and you are betting the “SaaSpocalypse” narrative, that ... AI Crushed Software Stocks. IGV Is Betting the ‘SaaSpocalypse’ Is Overblown
